items.title: [正面] A very generous gacha game with engaging gameplay ...
items.summary:
A very generous gacha game with engaging gameplay and interesting lovecraft inspired design.
I played completely as F2P ( i didn't find a way to give them money even when i wanted to) and so far I didn't encounter any roadblocks.

For those complaining about the english translation not being perfect it's a minor issue: everything important is translated properly and even if some parts of the story have weird dialogues it's perfectly understandable.

Gameplay itself can be time consuming since there's no autobattle and only farming stages have swipe, that can be a good or bad thing depending on the type of game you are looking for.

Main story and events so far have been pretty good even if it requires a lot of reading.

items.title: [正面] Great game, fun and challenging combat system, nic...
items.summary: Great game, fun and challenging combat system, nice art, f2p friendly... amazing

items.title: [正面] YES. This is actually FUN, unlike most Gacha games...
items.summary:
YES. This is actually FUN, unlike most Gacha games that are a hefty slog. The rates are pretty high too (or maybe it's just my luck) but I got the banner characters in a single 5-pull. *smug*
Anyway, this is undeniably a gacha game sure, but it's such a good game concept wise too.
